description: Expected validation state for mx_uam_izt_cbi — UAM Iztapalapa CBI (control adaptativo, ingeniería eléctrica)
notes: UAM Iztapalapa CBI — posgrado en ingeniería eléctrica. Corpus pesado: 2 directores + 5-person committee, ES+EN abstract, CONAHCYT funding, 6 BibTeX entries, 6 citation blocks, 3 numbered equations (with \eqref{} references via raw_latex), 1 figure (PNG placeholder), 1 booktabs table (6-row comparison), glossary section with 4 acronyms + 3 terms, appendix. Tests: bibliography pipeline, figure/table inclusion, equation numbering, glossary/acronym rendering, LoF, LoT, and full CBI UAM-Iztapalapa institutional structure.
